 \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \- 

**For your consideration**  
Senior UX Engineer and Product Design Leader with 10+ years of experience architecting scalable frontend systems across financial, healthcare ,marketing and enterprise platforms. Specializes in design system governance, WCAG 2.2 accessibility compliance, responsive UI architecture, and cross-functional sprint leadership. Bridges design and engineering to deliver performant, maintainable interfaces using HTM/CSS3 Vue, React, Angular, and modern JavaScript ecosystems.  
Tech Stack  
Design Tools: Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, Lightroom,  After Effects, InVision  
Front-End Development: HTML5, CSS3/SASS, JavaScript (ES6+), Vue.js, React.js, Angular.js, Node.js    
UX/UI Frameworks: Bootstrap, Material UI, Tailwind CSS    
CI/CD: GitHub, GitKraken, SourceTree, AWS, Docker, Adobe Experience Manager  
Team Project: Jira, FigJam, Miro, Slack, Teams, Trello, Asana, Salesforce, Analytics, OBS, Discord, Canva

**Experience**  
YellowBridge — Pittsburgh, PA (contract remote)   
 Designer \~ Apr 2025 – Oct 2025  \- Rapid prototyping & Responsive implementation of landing page designs into social campaign assets with Figma & Adobe XD

Creative Assembly — Pittsburgh, PA (contract remote)   
 Lead Front-tend Developer \~ Feb 2024 – Aug 2024  \- Landing Page & Design System Styling with [Vue.js](http://Vue.js) \+ SASS

BNY Mellon — Pittsburgh, PA (hybrid)  
  Sr. UX Product Designer, Investment Management \~ Jan 2023 – Feb 2024  
  \- Created prototypes to streamline client pathways and library enhancements on account management utilizing responsive breakpoints for their many display needs.  
  \- Worked with clients & stakeholders to understand areas that could be improved with design patterns in their data visualization (graphing & reporting) dashboards.  
  \- Collaborated with developers to understand the lift and scope as well as impact on wider shared services and align components into WCAG 2.2 AA with semantic HTML.  
  \- Led cross-functional sprint planning sessions to define scope, acceptance criteria, sprint planning alongside client/user heuristics feedback and UI engineering lift across  
    reporting dashboard initiatives used by top-tier banking clients and their particular personalization needs.  
  \- Co-architected a global Figma component library integrated with Storybook \+ Angular, aligning design tokens & FE implementation to reduce design-to-dev drift that  
    improved release consistency and feature progression as well as sustainability and accessibility (ADA / WCAG /ARIA).  
  \- Coordinated and implemented project roadmaps, component library (QC) checklists, and planned features in Kanban/Scrum/Agile boards.  
  \- Led UX design efforts to modernize consumer banking apps, simplifying transfers, automated user flows for reporting and spearheaded internationalization efforts.  
  \- Developed structured prompt systems to support design documentation, UI refinement, and component standardization (naming, color contrast & consistency).

TwitchTV Partner Designer – (remote) Merch Branding / Discord / Content Assets \~ July 2022  – Aug 2024

Joel Dombek Design — Pittsburgh, PA (freelance)  
 Branding, Design \+ Lead Development, Social \~ Dec 2021 – Oct 2025  
 \- Created brand designs and development solutions for myself and independent content creators.  
 \- Developed webhook services for social integration for Twitch \+ OBS \+ Discord.

ConnectiveRX — Pittsburgh, PA (hybrid)   
 Lead UI/x & Frontend Engineer \~ August 2018 – May 2022  
 \- Led frontend development and UI architecture for multi-tenant enterprise healthcare platforms serving Bayer and Johnson & Johnson, developing scalable CSS/SCSS  
   systems and modular component patterns for performance and accessibility.  
 \- Presented Figma prototypes to client/stakeholders as well Partnered with QA to validate frontend interfaces through automated regression testing and accessibility   
   audits, ensuring WCAG 2.2 AA compliance and reducing release defects and aided in training material/documentation and feedback forms.  
 \- Lead the collaborative feedback process through Figma/FigJam to gain insights from clients and wider team in feature inception and project projection planning as well   
   as partnering with backend developers to integrate frontend interfaces with APIs and services.  
 \- Wrote Acceptance Criteria for interactions and helped design data models/objects for user-centric interactions focused on feedback with data entry and API integration.  
 \- Gave several Design & Front-end focused lunch-n-learn presentations to Devs \+ PMs showing how to implement and market new system features for clients.

Dick’s Sporting Goods — Pittsburgh, PA   
 Digital Designer & Lead Front-End Developer \~ August 2015 – April 2018  
 \- Created a design library for the DSG “House of Brands” to unify messaging cadence inside seasonal campaigns for Field & Stream, Golf Galaxy and the Outdoor categories that worked across mobile & desktop landing pages that made each media channel modular.  
 \- Worked on special typographic treatments in collaboration with brands such as: Columbia, Yeti, The North Face, Nike and Reebok as well as the technical/marketing writing tone across seasonal campaigns.  
 \- Worked as and with photographers on shot-plans of both model and product images with coordinated messaging across seasonal campaigns.

Giant Eagle — Pittsburgh, PA  Front-End Developer & Designer \~ October 2014 \- March 2015  
Agency 1903 — Pittsburgh, PA (hybrid)  Front-End Developer & Designer  / UI / QA \~ February 2014 \- December 2014  
Arsenal Studios— Pittsburgh, PA (remote) UX Designer / Front-end Developer / QA / Motion Graphics \~ February 2013 \- December 2013  
Entercom Corp. —  Pittston, PA Branding / Web Development / Social \~ May 2017 – July 2018  
Content Factory —  Pittsburgh, PA Branding / Web Development / Social \~ April  2015 – February 2016  
ProActive Clinic —  Portland, OR (remote)  Photography Branding Site \~ August 2014 \- December 2014  
Medcom Solutions — Pittsburgh, PA  Web Design / Development \~ March 2013 \- September 2013  
Peace by Piece — Toronto, Canada (remote) \~ Logo Design & Web Design \~ March 2012  
Maniac Magazine — Pittsburgh, PA \~ Site Redesign & Styling \~ March 2012  
Guaranteed Results Marketing— Pittsburgh, PA Web Designer / Developer \~ July 2011 \- June 2012  
Morning Hockey —  Pittsburgh, PA \~ Logo Design Embroidery \~ March 2011  
Envelope Service — Chester, WV Graphic Designer / Print Production \~ March 2008 \- January 2011  
CommonWealth Press —  Pittsburgh, PA \~ Screen Printing / Design \~ 2006 & 2007

**Leadership & Systems Impact**  
\- Led cross-functional collaboration across Product, Engineering, and Design teams  
\- Drove design system governance and reduced design churn  
\- Facilitated sprint planning and acceptance criteria definition  
\- Presented UX engineering strategy to stakeholders and senior leadership  
\- Delivered rapid prototypes to accelerate GTM and stakeholder alignment

| Education Bachelors of Science Degree in Graphic Design The Art Institute of Pittsburgh  2004 – 2008  GPA 3.8 Diploma Interactive Media & Web Development The Art Institute of Pittsburgh 2010 – 2012 GPA 3.6  \- Member of The Student Web Developers Club  | Skills \- User-Centered (UCD) Figma UI Design Systems & UX Component Libraries (ADA) \- Front-End Development HTML, CSS, JavaScrip, Vue.js, React/Angular.js \- Agile/Scrum & Remote Team Collaboration & Resource Gathering FigJam & Miro \- Maze \+ UserTesting heuristics tests, technical writing, AI prompts \+ Discord bots  \- Social posts, campaign promo messaging, social preview, Discord bots(webhooks) \- Design Systems & Branding Guidelines (palettes, fonts, assets) motion graphics \- WCAG 2.2 (AA and AAA levels), ARIA, assistive technology testing |
